description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build sdist and Wheels that runs on push to main, on release published, and on workflow dispatch. Use a matrix strategy to build wheels on multiple OS environments including ubuntu, windows, and macos. For each OS, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, cythonize, build wheels and sdists using cibuildwheel and build, and upload the resulting wheels as artifacts. Additionally, combine all wheels into a single artifact and upload it. If a release is published, upload the wheels to PyPI.
